_README: Source of truth for the Robot Fantôme shop. Edit this file, then run `python3 scripts/build_shop.py` to regenerate the shop/<id>.html product pages and the Shop-tab cards in index.html. ALL PRICES, COPY, AND IMAGES BELOW ARE PLACEHOLDERS for products marked "draft": true — replace them before launch.

products.name: Robot Fantôme sticker pack
products.tagline: Die-cut vinyl stickers — slap them on everything.
products.meta_description: Die-cut weatherproof vinyl stickers from Robot Fantôme — slap them on everything. Hand-made indie / punk art stickers by Absolutely Plausible, Orlando FL.
products.description: A pack of weatherproof die-cut vinyl stickers. PLACEHOLDER copy — replace with the real pack contents, count, and sizes.

products.name: Reclaimed pallet shoe cubby
products.tagline: One-of-a-kind artifact built from reclaimed pallets.
products.meta_description: A one-of-a-kind shoe cubby hand-built from reclaimed shipping pallets by Robot Fantôme. Zero-waste functional art — local pickup or freight, Orlando FL.
products.description: Hand-built from reclaimed shipping pallets — one of a kind. PLACEHOLDER copy and price — replace with real dimensions and weight. Pallet artifacts are local pickup or freight only (heavy/oversized).

products.name: “Art is Local” — collage print
products.tagline: Print of an original hand-made collage. Originals are not for sale.
products.meta_description: “Art is Local” — an archival print of an original hand-made Robot Fantôme collage. Originals are never for sale; prints only. Indie collage art from Orlando.
products.description: A print reproduction of an original Robot Fantôme collage. Luiz makes the originals by hand and keeps them; the shop sells prints only. PLACEHOLDER copy, price, and sizes — replace before launch.

products.name: Second-Hand-made shirt — washed Nirvana
products.tagline: 100% zero-waste. One thrifted shirt, reborn by hand as band merch.
products.meta_description: 100% zero-waste Second-Hand-made shirt by Robot Fantôme — one thrifted Nirvana tee reborn by hand as band merch. One-of-a-kind, size M, from Orlando.
products.description: A one-of-a-kind “Second-Hand-made” shirt: a second-hand thrift-store shirt turned into Robot Fantôme merch by hand — 100% zero-waste, sustainable art. Size M. PLACEHOLDER copy — replace with real size, condition, and photos.
